title: Pterocypsela elata
intro: Pterocypsela elata, also known as Xuan-shen, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. Bioactive constituents of Pterocypsela elata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Pterocypsela elata is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tablet, and is commonly used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
